goal: Stand up the local-first learned-routing loop: real ruflo upgrade, Node/.mjs reward/verify/budget lib, judge wired in-loop as a day-one safety reflex, DRACO-shaped RVF corpus logged from day one, per-category champion that auto-graduates to a per-question learned router via ruflo's SelfEvolvingRouter promotion gate; v2 schema, metaharness comparison, and a Rust gateway sidecar as committed gated follow-ons.

phases.goal: Make the ruflo upgrade real (enable ruflo MCP, npx resolves >=3.18.1, neural training backend available) + capture routing baseline.
definition_of_done: prose: neural status reports native training backend available (#2549 fix live)

phases.goal: Port the 4 reward/verify/budget bash scripts to portable Node/.mjs (behavior-preserving, in-process judge, no bash/jq/curl).
Wire the judge in-loop as the safe reflex: local answer scored, escalate to frontier on low score; private never escalates.
Record every routing decision as a DRACO row incl. embedding into a ruvector RVF corpus from day one (no-backfill rule).
definition_of_done: prose: two records grow the RVF vector count

phases.goal: Per-category champion + budget steering on tier-schema v1; invoke ruflo route() in the product path.
definition_of_done: vitest router tests pass (floors + budget demotion)

phases.goal: Per-question challenger in shadow + evidence-gated SelfEvolvingRouter promotion with auto-rollback.
Adopt tier-schema v2 (per-request locality) at promotion; flip the invariant check.
Offline-evaluate @metaharness/router vs the promoted ruflo router on the corpus; record adopt/keep decision (never two live learners).
Rust ruvector-gateway sidecar (tiny-dancer FastGRNN + HNSW + budget + OTel) fronting LiteLLM; parity with the Node loop at sub-5ms/25ms.
definition_of_done: prose: p95 <5ms/25ms + decision parity with Node loop

summary: Phase 0: ruflo@3.21.1 enabled+resolves, native neural backend available (#2549 live), baseline p50 5.83s/p95 6.30s captured. DoD 5/5; live smoke deferred (no gateway surface).

Phase 1: ported 4 bash scripts to scripts/lib/*.mjs (in-process judge) + reward.mjs; 69 node:test pass; thin shims kept; Tier-3 no injection hole, fixed 2 MEDIUM qreg degradation bugs; node --test dir->glob fix.

Phase 2: reflex.mjs verify-then-escalate; risk-phase review caught CRITICAL fail-open privacy pin, fixed via fail-closed scorable-tier allowlist (5 leak-vector tests, client untouched); 22 reflex tests, 91 total.

Phase 3: recorder.mjs -> real .rvf via @ruvector/rvf, in-process ruvllm embedder (no argv leak); Tier-3 fixed 7 findings incl. CRITICAL argv privacy; 10 recorder tests, 101 total; filed ruvnet/RuVector#641.
Phase 4: router.mjs per-category champion; ruflo route()=AGENT router (grounded) -> floor -> budget steer (fail-closed); Tier-3 fixed 2 HIGH budget fail-opens; 25 router tests, 126 total.

Phase 5: KRR learned router + shadow challenger + evidence-gated promotion/rollback; Tier-3/4 caught CRITICAL gate fail-open (cost-dominated q/$), fixed w/ quality-bar+no-regression+se-floor+trend-aware rollback; 17 tests, 143 total.
Phase 6 (9a): @ruvector/rvf 0.2.3 closes #641; no-stub real-embedder default at trainRouter boundary; resolveEmbedder probe-once; embedding validation. Tier-3 fixed 4 findings. 150 tests.

Phase 7 (Option A, re-scoped): forward-compatible locality — additive per-tier `locality` field (haiku/sonnet=local, opus=cloud), schema_version 1→2 (proved inert at runtime; no script reads ruflo-tiers.json), invariant now accepts v1|v2. Documented per-request locality as runtime pinnedPrivate concern. Non-breaking: .tiers map shape unchanged, compose renders, 150 tests green, tier-private pin intact (absent from alts map).

Phase 8 (risk): anti-overfitting promotion proofs. Added frozen hash-pinned held-out set (tests/promotion-eval-frozen-v1.json), paired significance test (pure-JS normal CDF), overfitting guard (auto-up/human-flat), evaluateWithHeldOut composing on top of untouched F1-F3, and replay-promotion.mjs (clean-room offline receipt replay). Tier-3/4 adversarial review (qe-security-reviewer) found 5 defects (2 HIGH: subset cherry-pick, tamper-throw-leaves-promoted; 3 MED/LOW: overfit blind-band, self-referential hash, unclaimed-receipt) — ALL fixed + regression-tested. 172 tests (was 150), 0 fail.

Phase 9 (D11): real negatives + no-stub embedder end-to-end. recorder.mjs: added REQUIRED success field (real PostToolUse outcome — never hardcoded true, ruflo 3.22 fix) so the corpus carries negatives; isNegativeOutcome + outcomeFromReflex (a reflex escalation => local-tier negative); recorderEmbedderDecision + resolveRecorderEmbedder honor RUFLO_REQUIRE_REAL_EMBEDDINGS (real ruvllm default, never a stub vector); open() default embed now resolves real, injection still wins. reflex.mjs untouched (phase-2 fail-closed pin intact). 181 tests (was 172), 0 fail.
